titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Daniele Varè \ Elizabeth Vincent Foster Collection
titlestmt.author: by Timothy Young

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

PUBLIC "-//Yale University::Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library//TEXT (US::CtYBR::::[DANIELE VARè \ ELIZABETH VINCENT FOSTER COLLECTION ])//EN" "vare.xml" converted from EAD 1.0 to 2002 by v1to02.xsl (sy2003-10-15).

did.unittitle: Daniele Varè / Elizabeth Vincent Foster collection

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: A collection consisting principally of letters from Varè to Elizabeth Foster, who was married to Varè's nephew, Maxwell Foster. The letters cover Varè's various diplomatic assigments and his family life, leading up to, during, and after World War II. Also included are letters from other Varè family members to Foster, along with several third-party letters and materials related to the Varè family.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchase from Serendipity Books on the Edwin J. Beinecke Book Fund, 2000.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Daniele Varè \ Elizabeth Vincent Foster Collection is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Daniele Varè Letters \ Elizabeth Vincent Foster Collection. General Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

relatedmaterial.head: Associated Materials
relatedmaterial.p: Other Foster family materials are in the Yale Collection of American Literature.

bioghist.head: DANIEL VARè
bioghist.p: Daniele Varè, Italian Minister to the Imperial Court in China, and diplomat, was the uncle of Maxwell Foster, a Yale alumnus and attorney, who married Elizabeth Vincent in 1927.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Series I, Letters from Daniele Varè to Elizabeth Vincent Foster
makes up the bulk of this archive. Written between 1920 and 1954, the letters detail Varè's family life, his service as an Italian diplomat, and his concerns during World War II.

Series II, Other letters
, contains many to Elizabeth Vincent Foster from other correspondents (principally Varè family members), and correspondence of others. Series III, Other Materials
, includes printed copies of writings by Varè, calling cards, and photographs.

did.unittitle: Daniele Varè letters to Elizabeth Vincent Foster
Letter of introduction for George E. Vincent (as president of the Rockefeller Foundation)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes printouts of webpages re: Rockefeller Foundation

did.unittitle: to the Varè family in care of the Fosters
"British Foreign Policy through Italian Eyes" by Daniele Varè, offprint
"The German Character", by Daniele Varè, printed version, Times
Menu, signed by George E. Vincent and others
